{{Quote|I don't think you have to look any further. I'm the man you're looking for.|Helm Iskraker|<ref name="CC" />}}
'''Helm Iskraker''' was a known small-time criminal. A large [[Nothoiin (species)/Legends|Nothoiin]]<ref name="Galactic Cartography" /> with rolling layers of gold-colored skin, he traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in his ship, the ''[[Erratic Orbit]]''. His reputation was often quite negative—he was known by other criminals as a bumbler and someone who could not be relied upon to get the job done. Despite this reputation, he flawlessly carried out a job on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Death">In [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] entry in ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 54]]'', the murder of Issan Len in ''[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|Crisis on Cloud City]]'' is mentioned to have occurred before [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9's]] rampage through [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. That even was referred to in [[Idiot's Array/Legends|''Idiot's Array'']], which was stated to have taken place in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref> where he was hired to steal the security codes for the [[Computer Core|city's computer core]]. [[SecuriCo]] authorities on the station could never trace the crime back to him.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]] indicated that fellow ''[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]]'' author [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]] intended for Helm Iskraker to be of the [[Nothoiin (species)/Legends|Nothoiin]] species.<ref name="Galactic Cartography" />
